# divider — API (React, the parity reference)

Exports: `Separator`, `SeparatorProps`

Solid mirrors these props. Vanilla takes the same props as a factory argument
(handle out, `.el` is the node); web-components as `<zen-divider>`-style
attributes/properties. Divergences (Select, Toast, data-driven families) are in
SKILL.md.

- from `@radix-ui/react-avatar`: `asChild?`
- from `@radix-ui/react-separator`: `orientation?`, `decorative?`
- …plus the underlying element's standard props (280 inherited).
